data.title: Coinbase executive: Satoshi Nakamoto may still be active on the chain in 2014
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Conor Grogan, head of research at Coinbase, claims to have identified a wallet belonging to Satoshi Nakamoto and found that it was still active on the chain in 2014. Grogan's statement is based on a set of "Patoshi Pattern" Bitcoin addresses recently catalogued by the blockchain analysis platform Arkham. Grogan said that although these addresses cannot be clearly related to Satoshi Nakamoto, "there is sufficient evidence." These addresses have sent BTC 24 times, some of which went to the Canadian exchange CaVirtEx (acquired by Kraken in 2016). He speculated that Kraken may have information about Satoshi's identity, but Kraken officials only responded: "We are all Satoshi." (The Block)

data.title: A smart money opened a $35,000 USD position in $TST 5 minutes before CZ mentioned it, and now has a floating profit of $657,000 USD
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to ai_9684xtpa monitoring, a certain smart money/lucky person 0xeBB…74711c took the lead in building a position of $35,000 5 minutes before CZ mentioned the $TST token, and now has a floating profit of $657,000, with a return rate of up to 1885%.
After CZ tweeted, the address quickly added 2 BNBs and currently holds 28.82 million TST, becoming the TOP 1 holding address of the token.

data.title: Rena's market value once exceeded 17 million US dollars, with the highest increase reaching 100.07%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest data from GMGN, the price of DeAgentAI ecological token Rena has risen by as much as 100.07%, and its market value has once exceeded 17 million US dollars. Rena AI is an on-chain fund based on AlphaX. As the mapping token of AlphaX, Rena inherits the advantage of AlphaX as a Web3 AI trading system.

data.title: Binance Expands Berachain (BERA) Integration Across Platforms Including Earn, Futures, and Convert Services
data.description: Binance is set to enhance its platform capabilities by integrating Berachain (BERA) into a wide array of its services. Starting from February 6, 2025, at 13:00 UTC, Binance users will have the opportunity to engage with BERA through Binance Simple Earn, Buy Crypto, Binance Convert, Binance Margin, Auto-Invest, and Futures.Key Integration Details:Simple Earn: BERA Flexible Products will be available for subscription in Binance Simple Earn starting February 6, 2025, at 13:00 UTC.Buy & Sell Crypto: Post-listing, users can buy BERA via multiple payment methods including VISA, MasterCard, and digital wallets like Google Pay and Apple Pay on Binance’s “Buy Crypto” page.Convert: Zero-fee trading of BERA against BTC, USDT, and other tokens will commence shortly after BERA is listed on Binance Spot.Margin Trading: BERA will be added to both Cross and Isolated Margin as a borrowable asset with the BERA/USDT and BERA/USDC pairs available from February 6, 2025, at 16:00 UTC. Early access for Binance VIP 7 to VIP 9 users starts approximately 30 minutes prior.Futures: The USDⓈ-M BERA Perpetual Contract launches on February 6, 2025, at 15:00 UTC, offering up to 75x leverage.

data.title: AlphaX trading profits will be used to repurchase Rena tokens, with an estimated annual profit of over $2 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official disclosure, AlphaX trading income will be used to repurchase Rena tokens, and the market stability and long-term value of Rena tokens will be enhanced through the ecological cycle mechanism. According to the actual test data of AlphaX, the AI ​​trading system is expected to have an annual profit of more than 2 million US dollars, and this part of the income will be used for the repurchase and liquidity optimization of Rena tokens. As a DeAgentAI ecological trading engine, AlphaX runs on the Rena framework, combining AI-driven transaction execution, market forecasting and risk control optimization.

data.title: The market value of the meme token TST mentioned by CZ exceeds 40 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN data shows that the market value of the Meme token TST mentioned by CZ has exceeded 40 million US dollars, and is currently reported at 41.3 million US dollars. 
Earlier, CZ posted on the X platform: "Previously, an educational video for meme tokens was launched. In this video, the token named TST was launched as an example. Then the token appeared in the community. After learning about this, the team members deleted the video. But the Internet will not forget. CZ said that it is recommended to put the video tutorial back, but it does not represent his recognition of the token. The team member also deleted the private key of the creator address used in the tutorial, which holds 0.13% of the tokens. No one in the team (or Binance) holds the token. TST is not the official token of the BNB Chain team or anyone. It is just a test token for the video tutorial. That's all." 
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: Bitcoin Could Crash Significantly If It Fails to Hold Critical Support
data.description:
A well-known crypto analyst has raised concerns about Bitcoin’s stability, warning that a major drop could be on the horizon if the asset fails to maintain a crucial support level.
The post Bitcoin Could Crash Significantly If It Fails to Hold Critical Support appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/bitcoin-could-crash-significantly-if-it-fails-to-hold-critical-support/

data.title: Binance will launch BERA leveraged trading, perpetual contracts and simple earning
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch leveraged trading of BERA/USDT and BERA/USDC at 4:00 pm (UTC) on February 6, 2025, and USDⓈ-MBERA perpetual contract at 3:00 pm (UTC) on February 6, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 75 times. In addition, BERA will be launched on Binance Simple Earn Coin at 1:00 pm (UTC) on February 6, 2025, and users can start subscribing. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
